Your Path to US Medical Career

Empowering International Medical Graduates for Success

We specialize in comprehensive clinical rotation programs that equip international medical graduates with the skills and experience to excel in the US medical system.

Our Programs Contact Us
What We Offer

Our Programs

Our programs are designed to offer international medical graduates a comprehensive and immersive experience in the US healthcare system, with a focus on practical, hands-on training.

Clinical Practice Exposure

Experience firsthand how US healthcare operates by observing and participating in clinical workflows, learning critical decision-making from experienced physicians.

Clinical Skills Development

Enhance essential clinical skills through hands-on training in patient care, diagnostics, and medical procedures, preparing you for US healthcare standards.

Feedback & Recommendation

Receive continuous evaluations to track your progress, plus a letter of recommendation from the supervising physician to support your residency applications.

Why Choose Us

What Sets Us Apart

With a deep understanding of the challenges faced by international graduates, we support and empower each participant.

Expert Guidance

Benefit from Dr. Ann Kim's extensive experience and deep understanding of both international and US medical systems.

Comprehensive Training

Our programs provide a well-rounded experience, ensuring you are fully prepared for the challenges ahead in US healthcare practice.

Personalized Approach

We tailor our programs to meet your individual needs and career goals, providing mentorship every step of the way.

Success Stories

What Our Graduates Say

Our graduates have gone on to secure residency positions at programs across the United States.

"During my 4-week internship, I gained valuable hands-on experience, including patient care, diagnostic tests, and consultations. Dr. Kim's guidance and passion made this experience pivotal for my future medical career in the US."
Kate Seong, MD
Accepted to NY Internal Medicine Residency Program 2021
"Working at Joy Internal was an incredible experience that provided hands-on exposure to comprehensive primary care. Dr. Kim was a fantastic mentor, and the staff made me feel like part of the family."
Clinical Rotation Graduate
Accepted to Neurology Program 2021
"My internship gave me valuable insight into the role of a primary care physician in the US. The experience was incredibly enriching and will greatly benefit my future career."
Myungwoo Nam, MD
Accepted to NY Internal Medicine Program 2021
